properties.displayName: Deploy Function App Logs (Linux) to a CSTRM Event Hub
nonComplianceMessages: Function App Log Forwarding configuration doesn't meet AA SCCF Benchmark control: Function Apps must have auditing enabled and logs must be forwarded to the approved CSTRM Event Hub.  If you would like to seek an exception for this policy, please reference this guide. https://developer.aa.com/docs/default/component/gaas-policy_as_code
